goal: Make the cell boundary non-penetrable while preserving native water swimming and the current visual membrane.
changes: Added a scoped invisible CellWallCollisionBounds folder under CellEnvironment_Main.
Added six anchored boundary blockers around the playable water/cell volume.
Set every boundary blocker to CanCollide=true, CanTouch=false, CanQuery=true, Transparency=1.
Added CellWallCollisionMode, CellWallCollisionParts, and CellWallCollisionThickness metadata to CellEnvironment_Main.
Kept visual membrane/organelle meshes unchanged and preserved NativeWaterSwimming.
validation: Deployed BuildMainCellExperience.lua into Roblox Studio through the legacy bridge.
Ran require(builder).build() and confirmed six live collidable wall blockers.
result: The player should no longer be able to swim out through the cell boundary.
